commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blocker includes contributor-supplied real behavior proof, so this should stay in author/human follow-up rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff is intended OAuth availability hardening, but the oversized diagnostic cap still needs a small follow-up before the patch should be considered clean.; Review finding: [P2] Use a small diagnostic cap for OAuth error text — exten... (sha=259deeec4a0533732698a97d5952872e35009665)
commands.review_summary:
The PR bounds OpenAI OAuth token response reads in the OpenAI plugin runtime and adds oversized and malformed response tests.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +87. Total +119 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source-reproduces the reported problem because postTokenForm buffers the guarded OAuth token endpoint body with raw response.arrayBuffer() before any bounded JSON or text reader can apply.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker includes contributor-supplied real behavior proof, so this should stay in author/human follow-up rather than a ClawSweeper repair lane.

target.title: fix(openai): bound Codex OAuth JSON and error response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`postTokenForm` in `extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts`
reads the OpenAI Codex OAuth token endpoint response body with an unbounded
`await response.arrayBuffer()`. A compromised or hijacked OAuth endpoint can
stream an arbitrarily large body and force the runtime to buffer the entire
payload — an OOM/DoS vector.

## Changes

- `extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts` — import
  `readResponseWithLimit` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/response-limit-runtime`;
  replace `await response.arrayBuffer()` with `readResponseWithLimit` at 16
  MiB cap inside `postTokenForm`, before `release()`. Also replace
  `response.json()` and `response.text()` in `exchangeAuthorizationCode` and
  `refreshAccessToken` with `readProviderJsonResponse` and
  `readResponseTextLimited` for defense-in-depth.
- `extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.test.ts` — 4 new tests
  covering oversized exchange, oversized refresh, malformed JSON, and error
  body bounding.

## Evidence

### Real behavior proof

```text
$ node --import tsx proof-openai-oauth-bound.mts
=== Test 1: readProviderJsonResponse caps oversized streaming body ===
  chunks sent: 17
  error: openai-codex-token-exchange: JSON response exceeds 16777216 bytes
  PASS

=== Test 2: readProviderJsonResponse with valid JSON ===
  parsed access_token: tok_abc
  PASS

=== Test 3: readResponseTextLimited handles error body ===
  error text: "error detail: invalid_grant"
  PASS

=== Test 4: readProviderJsonResponse with malformed JSON ===
  error: openai-codex-token-exchange: malformed JSON response
  PASS

PASS: all OpenAI Codex OAuth bounding paths verified
```

A loopback HTTP server streams an oversized body and valid/malformed JSON
responses. `readResponseWithLimit` detects overflow at 16 MiB and cancels
the stream; `readProviderJsonResponse` validates JSON parsing.

### Tests

- **4 new Vitest cases**: oversized token exchange (`postTokenForm` level),
  oversized token refresh, malformed JSON rejection, and capped error body
  on failed exchange.
- **10 existing Vitest cases unchanged** — token exchange, token refresh,
  timeout, cancellation, unsafe lifetime rejection all pass.
- `pnpm test extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.test.ts` →
  **14 passed (14)**
target.author: solodmd

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
